name: Geocodio API
what_it_does: Geocodio API — forward and reverse geocoding for US and Canada addresses with congressional district, timezone, census tract, and school district appending.
use_cases: Batch geocoding lists of addresses to lat/lng coordinates for agent geospatial analysis
Reverse geocoding GPS coordinates to structured addresses in agent location workflows
Appending congressional district, state legislature, and county to addresses for civic applications
Address standardization and validation for agent data pipelines before storage
Geocoding in bulk (25,000 addresses per batch request) for agent ETL pipelines
not_for: Global geocoding — Geocodio only covers US and Canada; use Google Maps or HERE for global
Real-time place search or autocomplete — use Google Places or Mapbox for interactive search
IP-based geolocation — use IPinfo or MaxMind GeoIP for IP-to-location
best_when: Your agent needs to geocode US/Canada addresses with political district appending at low cost and high batch throughput.
avoid_when: You need global geocoding or real-time place autocomplete — Geocodio is US/Canada only.

auth.notes: Simple API key as query parameter (api_key=...). No OAuth complexity. Single key per account.

pricing.paid_tiers: $0.50 per 1,000 lookups; batch lookups same price; field appending adds $0.001/field/record
pricing.notes: Among the cheapest US geocoding APIs. Batch geocoding reduces per-lookup overhead. Free tier sufficient for development.

performance.rate_limits: Batch: up to 25,000 addresses per request; single lookups: 100 requests/second

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear JSON errors with error field and descriptive messages. Partial batch results have per-address status. Unmatched addresses return empty results, not errors — agents must check results array length.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All geocoding requests are idempotent — same address always returns same result (deterministic).
known_agent_gotchas: Unmatched addresses return empty results array without error — agents must check for empty results
Batch endpoint is async for very large batches (>10,000) — returns a batch ID to poll
API key is in the query string — ensure it's not logged in URL access logs
Congressional district appending has a per-field cost on top of base geocoding cost
Address parsing quality drops for non-standard formats — normalize addresses before geocoding

security_score_components.security_notes: Simple API key auth — no scopes or rotation mechanism. Key in query parameter is a minor risk (logged in access logs). TLS enforced. Small, focused service with minimal attack surface.
